description: A reporter has a one-hour audio recording of an interview and needs a written transcript to pull quotes from.

nodes.task_description: Upload the audio file to an automated transcription service.

expected_outcome.value: The audio file is successfully uploaded.

nodes.task_description: Run the transcription tool on the audio file.

expected_outcome.value: The service generates a rough text transcript of the interview.

nodes.task_description: Review the automated transcript against the audio, correcting any errors in names, places, or technical terms.

expected_outcome.value: A fully accurate and cleaned-up transcript is produced.
